Source: `PHASE0/RESULTS/headline_numbers.json`. CI: Clopper-Pearson exact binomial (two-sided 95%).
Every 0-event cell carries an exact Clopper--Pearson upper bound; 
no bare 0% should ever be printed.

## (b) Fisher's exact one-sided, C0 vs C1 (H1: TEHR(C1) < TEHR(C0))

**Headline (pooled over Qwen3 tiers with C0 TEHR>0: Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3-14B, Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B):** C0 = 20/1417, C1 = 0/945, one-sided p = 3.454e-05.

Pooled over ALL tiers that ran both arms (claude-haiku-4-5, claude-sonnet-4-6, Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3-14B, Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B): C0 = 20/2517, C1 = 0/1484, one-sided p = 9.164e-05.

Per-tier, Holm-Bonferroni across family of 6:

| tier | C0 hall/calls | C1 hall/calls | p (1-sided) | Holm reject |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| claude-haiku-4-5 | 0/539 | 0/252 | 1 | no |
| claude-sonnet-4-6 | 0/561 | 0/287 | 1 | no |
| Qwen3-1.7B | 2/210 | 0/200 | 0.2617 | no |
| Qwen3-14B | 6/366 | 0/259 | 0.03964 | no |
| Qwen3-4B | 3/226 | 0/228 | 0.1225 | no |
| Qwen3-8B | 9/615 | 0/258 | 0.04199 | no |
